title: Sort the Satisfaction — Marble Sort! Hybrid Hook
hook_3s: A manicured finger taps a pastel tray — glossy marbles tumble in buttery slow-mo onto a lavender conveyor, each one chiming as it lands.
scene_flow: 0–3s HOOK: ASMR close-up of a woman's finger hovering over a soft pastel tray; tap triggers a satisfying cascade of glossy color-coded marbles in slow motion against a lavender backdrop.

3–6s REVEAL: Camera pulls back to show the full Marble Sort! machine — conveyor belt humming, colored boxes glowing below. Marbles roll, plink, and drop into matching boxes. Tiny 'ding' + sparkle on each correct sort.

6–10s TENSION: Belt speeds up, mixed-color marbles approach. A red marble is heading toward the blue box — on-screen prompt 'TAP TO STOP!' — finger taps, belt pauses, marble redirects correctly. Dopamine pop.
10–13s WIN: Level clears, confetti burst in orange accent, stars fill, next level peek with a special striped marble teasing new mechanic.
13–15s CTA: Phone-in-hand product shot, app icon zooms in, 'Play Free' button pulses.
visual_direction: Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes. Lavender (#E5DFFF) backdrop with a light grey (#F0F0F8) sorting machine and conveyor; marbles in candy-bright primaries with subtle subsurface glow. Vibrant orange (#FFB13B) reserved for titles, CTAs, and win-state confetti. Macro depth-of-field on the hook frame for ASMR intimacy, then crisp top-down/3-quarter on gameplay. Soft global illumination, gentle bokeh, no harsh shadows — calm, satisfying, tactile.
rationale: The jigsaw archetype's audience overlap is gold, but the drag-to-place mechanic misrepresents our tap-and-release loop and risks policy flags — so we keep the ASMR finger-on-screen satisfaction beat but hard-cut at 3s into authentic Marble Sort gameplay in our true lavender/orange palette. UA team: test this hybrid against a pure-gameplay control on Meta + TikTok, watch D1 retention as the truth metric, and scale only if retention holds within 15% of organic. Lead with the slow-mo marble cascade thumbnail — it carries jigsaw-tier scroll-stop energy without the bait.
scenario_prompts: Hero frame, aspect 9:16, macro close-up of a woman's manicured finger tapping a soft rounded pastel tray releasing a cascade of glossy candy-colored marbles in slow motion onto a light grey (#F0F0F8) conveyor belt, lavender (#E5DFFF) background, vibrant orange (#FFB13B) title text reading 'Can you sort them all?' at top, Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes, soft global illumination, shallow depth of field, ASMR satisfying mood

Storyboard frame 2, aspect 9:16, three-quarter view of a cute 3D cartoon sorting machine with a moving conveyor belt carrying red, blue, yellow, and green glossy marbles dropping into matching colored boxes below, light grey (#F0F0F8) machine on lavender (#E5DFFF) background, vibrant orange (#FFB13B) on-screen text 'Match the colors' with tap-finger icon, Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes, soft pastel lighting, calm satisfying UI mood

Storyboard frame 3 win state, aspect 9:16, sorting machine surrounded by a burst of vibrant orange (#FFB13B) confetti and sparkles, all colored boxes filled with matching marbles glowing softly, lavender (#E5DFFF) background with light grey (#F0F0F8) accents, big bold orange text 'Level 1 Complete ✨' centered, Clean and colorful 3D cartoon style with soft, rounded shapes, celebratory but calm tone, soft bokeh
